summary: Completed frontend visual testing of 'Cyber-Auction Protocol' theme redesign. All 10 features tested successfully. The new dark theme with obsidian backgrounds (#050509), acid green (#d4ff00) primary accent, cyber blue (#00f0ff) and hot-pink (#ff2d7b) secondary accents is fully implemented and working correctly.

details: Navbar found with dark obsidian background
Logo with acid green Zap icon and 'BidBlitz' text
Deal Radar link in cyber blue color
Cyber blue timers for long auctions
GlobalJackpot displayed at top of page
LIVE indicator visible in cyber blue
Progress bar with gradient (acid → cyber → hot-pink)
🔥 HEISS badge with acid green styling
SSL badge with acid green accent
Stripe badge with cyber blue accent
All badges visible on right side of auctions page
Banner displays with dark obsidian-paper background
Cookie icon with acid green accent
Acid green logo and submit button
'10 kostenlose Gebote!' banner in acid green
Dark obsidian background with border-t border-white/10
BidBlitz logo with acid green accent
Deal Radar link in cyber blue
Social media icons with hover effects

critical_code_review_comments: tailwind.config.js - Cyber theme colors properly defined (acid, cyber, hot-pink, obsidian)
Navbar.js - Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes
Footer.js - Features section with Deal Radar and KI links properly styled
Auctions.js - Auction cards use cyber theme consistently
Login.js - Dark theme with proper form styling
Register.js - Includes free bids banner with acid green styling
CookieConsent.js - Multi-language support with cyber theme
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cyber-Auction Protocol theme is fully implemented. All visual elements use the correct color scheme: obsidian (#050509) backgrounds, acid green (#d4ff00) primary accent, cyber blue (#00f0ff) and hot-pink (#ff2d7b) secondary accents. Typography uses Barlow Condensed for headings and Manrope for body text. All filter buttons work correctly. Cookie consent banner is styled in cyber theme with multi-language support.
